title: Action and Reaction Explained
script_summary: Exploring Newton's third law through rocket propulsion.

segments.voiceover: Forces come in pairs — rockets push exhaust, exhaust pushes rockets.
This is Newton's third law of motion. Every action has an equal and opposite reaction.
Imagine a rocket in space. It expels gas downward and, boom, it shoots up!
This principle explains not just rockets but swimming, walking, and even flying.
So, every time you push off the ground, remember: you’re not just moving forward, you’re pushing against the Earth!
Want to explore more science concepts? Hit follow for more amazing insights!
